title: olearia townsonii
intro: Olearia townsonii, also known as Townson's tree daisy, is a shrub native to the southeastern regions of Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. These properties contribute to various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and protecting against infections. The plant can be prepared for use in herbal remedies through methods such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, applied topically, or taken orally.
